note_geometric: the same f applied to the UNwrapped flux would cost f(2pi-multiples) -- nonzero only because the argument is then not a group element
theorem: any 2pi-periodic f (= any class function of the U(1) group element) has f(W_core)=f(0)=0: core cost identically zero for the whole class; V4's single-cosine result is the n=1 case. B (SU(2)) is a volume index, not a loop holonomy: the theorem structurally does not apply.
